member.param: 失效时间（以秒为单位），默认是7天，不得大于七天。

member.name: P:SIE.OSS.Models.Qiniu.QiniuObjectMetadata.fsize
member.summary: 文件大小，int64 类型，单位为字节（Byte）。

member.name: P:SIE.OSS.Models.Qiniu.QiniuObjectMetadata.hash
member.summary: 文件HASH值，string 类型。

member.name: P:SIE.OSS.Models.Qiniu.QiniuObjectMetadata.md5
member.summary: 文件 md5 值，string类型，32 位 16 进制组成的字符串，只有通过直传文件和追加文件 API 上传的文件，服务端确保有该字段返回，如请求时服务端没有返回md5字段，可以通过请求qhash/md5 方法来获取，比如 http://test.com/test.mp4?qhash/md5

member.name: P:SIE.OSS.Models.Qiniu.QiniuObjectMetadata.mimeType
member.summary: 文件MIME类型，string 类型。

member.name: P:SIE.OSS.Models.Qiniu.QiniuObjectMetadata.putTime
member.summary: 文件上传时间，int64 类型，Unix时间戳格式，单位为 100 纳秒。 例如：值为13603956734587420的时间，对应的实际时间为2013-02-09 15:41:13。

member.name: P:SIE.OSS.Models.Qiniu.QiniuObjectMetadata.type
member.summary: 文件存储类型，uint32 类型，2 表示归档存储，1 表示低频存储，0表示普通存储。

member.name: P:SIE.OSS.Models.Qiniu.QiniuObjectMetadata.restoreStatus
member.summary: 归档存储文件的解冻状态，uint3 2类型，2表示解冻完成，1表示解冻中；归档文件冻结时，不返回该字段。

member.name: P:SIE.OSS.Models.Qiniu.QiniuObjectMetadata.status
member.summary: 文件状态，uint32 类型。1 表示禁用；只有禁用状态的文件才会返回该字段。

member.name: P:SIE.OSS.Models.Qiniu.QiniuObjectMetadata.expiration
member.summary: 文件过期删除日期，int64 类型，Unix 时间戳格式，具体文件过期日期计算参考 生命周期管理。文件在设置过期时间后才会返回该字段（通过生命周期规则设置文件过期时间，仅对该功能发布后满足规则条件新上传文件返回该字段；历史文件想要返回该字段需要在功能发布后可通过 修改文件过期删除时间 API 或者 修改文件生命周期 API 指定过期时间；对于已经设置过过期时间的历史文件，到期都会正常过期删除，只是服务端没有该字段返回) 例如：值为1568736000的时间，表示文件会在2019/9/18当天内删除。

member.name: P:SIE.OSS.Models.Qiniu.QiniuObjectMetadata.transitionToIA
member.summary: 文件生命周期中转为低频存储的日期，int64 类型，Unix 时间戳格式 ，具体日期计算参考 生命周期管理。文件在设置转低频后才会返回该字段（通过生命周期规则设置文件转低频，仅对该功能发布后满足规则条件新上传文件返回该字段；历史文件想要返回该字段需要在功能发布后可通过 修改文件生命周期 API 指定转低频时间；对于已经设置过转低频时间的历史文件，到期都会正常执行，只是服务端没有该字段返回) 例如：值为1568736000的时间，表示文件会在2019/9/18当天转为低频存储类型。

member.name: P:SIE.OSS.Models.Qiniu.QiniuObjectMetadata.transitionToARCHIVE
member.summary: 文件生命周期中转为归档存储的日期，int64 类型，Unix 时间戳格式 ，具体日期计算参考 生命周期管理。文件在设置转归档后才会返回该字段（通过生命周期规则设置文件转归档，仅对该功能发布后满足规则条件新上传文件返回该字段；历史文件想要返回该字段需要在功能发布后可通过 修改文件生命周期 API 指定转归档时间；对于已经设置过转归档时间的历史文件，到期都会正常执行，只是服务端没有该字段返回) 例如：值为1568736000的时间，表示文件会在2019/9/18当天转为低归档储类型。

member.summary: ACL that can be pre-defined during the bucket creation

member.name: P:OBS.Model.CreateBucketRequest.BucketName
member.summary: Bucket name

remarks.para: Mandatory parameter A bucket name must comply with the following rules: 1. Contains 3 to 63 characters, starts with a digit or letter, and supports lowercase letters, digits, hyphens (-), and periods (.). 2. Cannot be an IP address. 3. Cannot start or end with a hyphen (-) or period (.). 4. Cannot contain two consecutive periods (.), for example, "my..bucket". 5. Cannot contain periods (.) and hyphens (-) adjacent to each other, for example, "my-.bucket" or "my.-bucket".

member.summary: Bucket location

remarks.para: Optional parameter Bucket location. This parameter is mandatory unless the endpoint belongs to the default region.

member.summary: File used to record the download progress

member.summary: Start position for listing versioning objects (sorted by version ID)

remarks.para: Optional parameter This parameter works together with "KeyMarker" and specifies the object name from which the listing begins. Listed objects are sorted by object name and version ID in lexicographical order. If the values of "VersionIdMarker" and "KeyMarker" are inconsistent, this parameter is ineffective.

member.name: T:OBS.Model.ExtensionBucketPermissionEnum
member.summary: OBS bucket extension permission

member.name: F:OBS.Model.ExtensionBucketPermissionEnum.GrantRead
member.summary: Grant the read permission to all users belonging to the specified "domainId" for listing objects, listing multipart uploads, listing bucket versions, and obtaining bucket metadata.

member.name: F:OBS.Model.ExtensionBucketPermissionEnum.GrantWrite
member.summary: Grant the write permission to all users belonging to the specified "domainId" so that the users can create, delete, overwrite objects in buckets, as well as initialize, upload, copy, and combine parts and abort multipart uploads.

member.name: F:OBS.Model.ExtensionBucketPermissionEnum.GrantReadAcp
member.summary: Grant the READ_ACP permission to all users belonging to the specified "domainId" to obtain ACLs of objects.

member.name: F:OBS.Model.ExtensionBucketPermissionEnum.GrantWriteAcp
member.summary: Grant the WRITE_ACP permission to all users belonging to the specified "domainId" to modify bucket ACLs.

member.name: F:OBS.Model.ExtensionBucketPermissionEnum.GrantFullControl
member.summary: Grant full control permissions to all users belonging to the specified "domainId".

member.name: F:OBS.Model.ExtensionBucketPermissionEnum.GrantReadDelivered
member.summary: Grant the read permission to all users belonging to the specified "domainId". By default, these users have read permissions on all objects in the bucket.

member.name: F:OBS.Model.ExtensionBucketPermissionEnum.GrantFullControlDelivered
member.summary: Grant the full control permission to all users belonging to the specified "domainId". By default, these users have the full control permission on all objects in the bucket.

member.name: T:OBS.Model.ExtensionObjectPermissionEnum
member.summary: OBS bucket extension permission

member.name: F:OBS.Model.ExtensionObjectPermissionEnum.GrantRead
member.summary: Grant the read permission to all users belonging to the specified "domainId" to read objects and obtain object metadata.

member.name: F:OBS.Model.ExtensionObjectPermissionEnum.GrantReadAcp
member.summary: Grant the READ_ACP permission to all users belonging to the specified "domainId" to read ACLs of objects.

member.name: F:OBS.Model.ExtensionObjectPermissionEnum.GrantWriteAcp
member.summary: Grant the WRITE_ACP permission to all users belonging to the specified "domainId" to modify ACLs of objects.

member.name: F:OBS.Model.ExtensionObjectPermissionEnum.GrantFullControl
member.summary: Grant the full control permission to all users belonging to the specified "domainId" to read objects, obtain object metadata, as well as obtain and write object ACLs.

member.name: P:OBS.Model.WebsiteConfiguration.IndexDocument
member.summary: Hosting homepage

remarks.para: Optional parameter. This field will be appended to the end of the request to a folder. (For example, if the parameter value is "index.html" and the requested folder is "samplebucket/images/", content of object named "images/index.html" in the "samplebucket" bucket will be returned.) The parameter value cannot be blank or contain slashes (/).

member.summary: Redirection configuration for all requests

member.name: P:OBS.Model.WebsiteConfiguration.RoutingRules
member.summary: List of request redirection rules

remarks.para: Optional parameter. It is used together with "ErrorDocument" and "IndexDocument" and cannot be used together with "RedirectAllRequestsTo."

member.summary: Whether to verify the certificate

member.summary: Whether to negotiate the authentication mode. The default value is "true."

member.name: P:OBS.ObsConfig.AuthType
member.summary: Authentication mode used for accessing OBS. When protocol negotiation is enabled, this parameter is ineffective.

member.name: P:OBS.ObsConfig.MaxErrorRetry
member.summary: Maximum number of retry attempts upon a request failure. The default value is 3.

member.name: P:OBS.ObsConfig.ReceiveBufferSize
member.summary: Size of the socket reception buffer

member.name: P:OBS.ObsConfig.BufferSize
member.summary: Read/write cache size during an object upload

member.name: P:OBS.ObsConfig.SecurityProtocolType
member.summary: HTTPS protocol type

member.name: P:OBS.ObsConfig.Timeout
member.summary: Request timeout interval. The unit is millisecond.

member.name: P:OBS.ObsConfig.AsyncSocketTimeout
member.summary: Asynchronous request timeout interval. The unit is millisecond.

member.name: P:OBS.ObsConfig.KeepAlive
member.summary: Whether to use persistent connections. The default value is "true."

member.name: P:OBS.ObsConfig.ProxyHost
member.summary: Proxy address

member.name: P:OBS.ObsConfig.ProxyPort
member.summary: Proxy port

member.name: P:OBS.ObsConfig.ProxyUserName
member.summary: Username used for connecting to the proxy server

member.name: P:OBS.ObsConfig.ProxyPassword
member.summary: Password used for connecting to the proxy server

member.name: P:OBS.ObsConfig.ProxyDomain
member.summary: Domain to which the proxy belongs

member.name: P:OBS.ObsConfig.MaxIdleTime
member.summary: Maximum idle time for obtaining connections from the connection pool. The unit is millisecond. The default value is 30000.

member.name: P:OBS.ObsConfig.ConnectionLimit
member.summary: Maximum number of concurrently opened HTTP connections The default value is 1000.

member.name: P:OBS.ObsConfig.ReadWriteTimeout
member.summary: Data read/write timeout interval. The unit is millisecond. The default value is 60000.
